Best AI Call Answering Service UK 2026

Trade Tech Review— Research Team
2026-06-06
Last updated: 2026-06-06

We tested and compared seven AI call answering services for UK tradespeople. No affiliate links. No paid placements. Just honest rankings based on features, pricing, and real revenue impact for plumbers,electricians,locksmiths, and builders.

12 min read ICO Registered (ZC077271) Updated June 2026

Quick Verdict

Best for Revenue Capture
whoza.ai

WhatsApp delivery, review collection, competitor analysis. The complete system.

Best for Simplicity
Clara AI

Clean, straightforward call answering. No extra features to configure.

FeaturewhozaClaraMoneyARROWTeamSpamIONOS

Detailed Service Reviews

#1

whoza.ai

£59–£399/mo Revenue capture 4.8/5

Best for revenue capture. The complete system: Katie answers, Claire collects reviews, Rex analyses competitors.

Pros
  • WhatsApp delivery (3 sec)
  • Review collection built-in
  • Competitor analysis
  • No contract
  • 30-day guarantee
  • 15+ trade voices
Cons
  • Newer brand (2025)
  • AI-only (no humans)
#2

Clara AI

£49.99–£149.99/mo Simplicity 4.3/5

Best for simplicity. Clean, straightforward call answering with no extra features to configure.

Pros
  • Cheapest entry price
  • Good AI voices
  • Simple setup
  • Solid call handling
  • 7-day trial
Cons
  • Email delivery only
  • No review collection
  • 3-month minimum
  • No WhatsApp
  • No competitor analysis
#3

Moneypenny

£150–£400+/mo Human touch 4.2/5

Best for businesses where human relationships justify the premium. 3x the price of AI alternatives.

Pros
  • Human receptionists
  • 25+ years experience
  • Multi-language
  • Complex enquiry handling
Cons
  • Expensive
  • 12-month contracts
  • No WhatsApp
  • No review collection
  • No AI analytics
#4

ARROW

£99/mo (150 min) WhatsApp delivery 4/5

Good WhatsApp integration but limited by minute caps and missing revenue features.

Pros
  • WhatsApp delivery
  • UK-based
  • Good voice quality
  • Simple dashboard
Cons
  • Limited minutes
  • No review collection
  • No competitor analysis
  • Higher price per minute
#5

Team-Connect

£9.99–£79.99/mo Budget testing 3.8/5

Best for sole traders on tight budgets who want to trial call answering before committing.

Pros
  • Lowest price
  • No contract
  • 14-day trial
  • SMS delivery
Cons
  • No WhatsApp
  • No reviews
  • Basic AI
  • Limited trade features
  • No analytics
#6

Spamless

£29–£89/mo Spam filtering 3.7/5

Strong spam filtering but weak on revenue capture and trade-specific features.

Pros
  • Excellent spam filtering
  • Good call blocking
  • Clean interface
  • Affordable
Cons
  • No WhatsApp
  • No review collection
  • No competitor analysis
  • Limited customisation
  • Basic AI voice
#7

IONOS

£10–£35/mo Phone forwarding 3.2/5

Not a true AI call answering service. Basic forwarding with no AI voice or revenue features.

Pros
  • Very cheap
  • Reliable forwarding
  • Simple setup
  • Part of hosting package
Cons
  • No AI voice agent
  • No WhatsApp
  • No reviews
  • No analytics
  • Basic call routing only

Where whoza.ai Wins

WhatsApp Delivery

Enquiries arrive in your WhatsApp in 3 seconds with full context — caller name, number, trade type, urgency, and location. No app switching. No email checking.

Review Collection

Claire automatically sends review requests after every completed job. No manual follow-up. No forgotten customers. Google reviews on autopilot.

Competitor Analysis

Rex analyses what your competitors are doing — their pricing, their reviews, their gaps. See opportunities they are missing and capture that market.

How We Tested

We signed up for free trials with each service, made test calls, and evaluated:

  • Voice quality and naturalness
  • Call handling accuracy
  • Delivery speed and method
  • Setup time and complexity
  • Revenue capture features
  • Trade-specific customisation

No affiliate relationships. No paid placements. Rankings based on merit alone.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the best AI call answering service in the UK?

For most UK tradespeople, whoza.ai is the best AI call answering service because it captures revenue others miss — WhatsApp delivery in 3 seconds, automatic review collection, and competitor analysis. If you want the simplest setup with no extra features, Clara AI is best for simplicity. If you need human receptionists, Moneypenny is the premium choice.

Is Clara AI better than whoza.ai?

Clara AI is cheaper (£49.99 vs £59) and simpler to set up. whoza.ai captures more revenue through WhatsApp delivery, review collection, and competitor analysis. If you want basic call answering, Clara wins. If you want a complete revenue system, whoza.ai wins.

How much does AI call answering cost in the UK?

UK AI call answering services range from £9.99/month (Team-Connect) to £400+/month (Moneypenny). The sweet spot for most trades is £59–£125/month, where whoza.ai and Clara operate. See our full AI call answering pricing guide for detailed breakdowns.

Does AI call answering work for all trades?

Yes — AI call answering works for plumbers, electricians, roofers, locksmiths, heating engineers, builders, landscapers, and more. whoza.ai has 15+ trade-specific voices and setups. See our plumber, electrician, and locksmith pages for trade-specific details.

Can AI call answering collect Google reviews?

Only whoza.ai has review collection built-in. Claire (whoza's review engine) automatically sends review requests after completed jobs. Clara, Moneypenny, ARROW, and others require separate review tools at extra cost.

Which AI call answering service has WhatsApp delivery?

whoza.ai and ARROW both offer WhatsApp delivery. whoza.ai delivers enquiries in 3 seconds with full caller context. ARROW also delivers to WhatsApp but charges per minute and lacks review collection or competitor analysis.

Is there a contract with AI call answering services?

whoza.ai, ARROW, Team-Connect, and Spamless offer no-contract plans. Clara requires 3 months minimum. Moneypenny requires 12-month contracts. whoza.ai also offers a 30-day money-back guarantee.

How do I choose the right AI call answering service?

Start with your priorities: (1) Budget — Team-Connect or Clara for tight budgets; (2) Revenue capture — whoza.ai for WhatsApp + reviews + analytics; (3) Human touch — Moneypenny; (4) Simplicity — Clara. All offer free trials except Moneypenny.
